extra.reasoning: The property requires NOT(rec_drug_a AND rec_drug_b). rec_drug_a is set true only by rule rec_a_from_conjunction (priority 50) when bradycardia AND peptic_ulcer AND polypharmacy AND elderly AND low_ejection_fraction all hold. rec_drug_b is set true by rule rec_b_from_trigger (priority 50) whenever bradycardia holds. The conjunction that triggers rec_drug_a necessarily includes bradycardia=true, which independently triggers rec_drug_b (these are different outputs, each set by its own matching rule; no priority tie or default intervenes). Therefore any input satisfying the rec_drug_a conjunction also makes rec_drug_b true. Counterexample: bradycardia=peptic_ulcer=polypharmacy=elderly=low_ejection_fraction=true (other three inputs false). rec_drug_a=true and rec_drug_b=true simultaneously, violating mutual exclusion.
